titleStmt.title: SII 26.336: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 336. (A.R. No. 318 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South and East walls of the Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: Narasiṅgarāya: Śaka 1406 (mistake for 1411), Saumya, Ishaba (Vaikāsi) śu. 15, Thursday = 1489 A.D., May 14.

summary.p: This inscription records the foundation of a new village called Marundukkuṉādayapuram, on the hill at Tirukkachchūr for the merit of the king and his foremost servant (mudappāvāḍai) Ṉāgamanāyakkar. This was arranged by the latter's agent Chōḍa-Timmanāyakkar, and the karaṇakkar Śilumaraśar. It is stated that the house-sites in the place were allotted to various categories of families on condition that from the month of Āḍi in the year quoted above, for six months, they could enjoy the sites as sarvamānya (tax-free) and from the next year onwards each of the Kaikkōḷar (weaver) and other families should pay (1/4) paṇam as tax. It is stated that people of other religions should not occupy the place. It further states that the Paḷḷa families are exempted from the payment of the tax called vāśal-paṇam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara metinimisarakaṇṭakaṭṭāri sāḷuva ṉaraciṅkarāyaṟku cellāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 6 mel cellāniṉṟa saumya varuṣam Iṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pūrṇaiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiṉāl
narasiṁharāyar mutappāvāṭai ṉākamanāyakkar kāryattukku kaṭavar coṭattimmu ṉāyakkarum karaṇakkar cilumaracarum narasiṁharāyarkkum nākamaṉāyakkarkkum taṉmamākat tirukkaccūr malaimel
maruntukku ṉātayapuramāka putucāka vāstu Iṭṭu palapaṭṭaiyāna kuṭikaḷukku celālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Ivvaruṣam Āṭimātam mutal Āru mātavaraikkum savvammāṉiyam Itukku Etirām
varuṣam mutalāka mātam Oṉṟukku kaikkoḷakkum palapaṭṭaṭaikkuṭikaḷ carvakattuk kuṭikkum kāl(p)paṇam koḷḷakkaṭavom Ākavum Immatattār Oḻiya Aṉṉiyar maṭam paṇṇikkoḷḷa
kaṭavomalla koṇṭavarkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile po(ka*)kaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta taṉmattukku Irācataram naṭakkum per tānattārum maṟṟum ca vikkarapperum
koṇṭāl civatturoki Ākakaṭavarkaḷ vantu Eṟina paḷḷak kuṭikku vācal paṇam sarvva māniyam ĀkavumThe rest is lost.
Digital edition of SII 26.336 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
